name: Bug Report
description: Report a bug in Samaris OS Mountain Lake Alpha One
title: "[BUG] Short description of the bug"
labels: ["bug"]
body: |

  ## Affected Version
  Samaris OS Mountain Lake Alpha One — Mountain Lake (specify build date or ISO version)

  ## Component
  - [ ] Desktop shell (React)
  - [ ] Node.js native bridge
  - [ ] Chromium kiosk / boot
  - [ ] Wine integration
  - [ ] App Store
  - [ ] Specific app (name it below)
  - [ ] File system / persistence
  - [ ] Boot flow (GRUB / Plymouth)
  - [ ] Lock screen / Guest mode
  - [ ] Theme / UI
  - [ ] Other (describe below)

  ## Environment
  - VM or physical hardware?
  - VM software: QEMU / UTM / VMware / VirtualBox
  - Host OS:
  - CPU / RAM:
  - Graphics settings:

  ## Steps to Reproduce
  1.
  2.
  3.

  ## Expected Behavior
  What should happen.

  ## Actual Behavior
  What actually happens.

  ## Logs / Screenshots
  Attach logs or screenshots if available.

  ## Additional Context
  Any other information.

  ---
  *Report sent via contact.samaris.os@gmail.com*
